statusLine.command: bash -c 'input=$(cat); cwd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r ".workspace.current_dir // empty"); model=$(echo "$input" | jq -r ".model.display_name // empty"); remaining=$(echo "$input" | jq -r ".context_window.remaining_percentage // empty"); parts=(); [ -n "$cwd" ] && parts+=("$cwd"); [ -n "$model" ] && parts+=("$model"); [ -n "$remaining" ] && parts+=("Context: ${remaining}% remaining"); IFS=" | "; echo "${parts[*]}"'
